tasks.title: Verify defaultModel settings support for non-Claude providers
tasks.notes: Code analysis findings — CLI testing not possible on PM machine (no Gemini/Codex CLIs). | Provider | Config key | Honors it? | Notes | |---------|------------|-----------|-------| | Claude | model in ~/.claude/settings.json | Yes | Confirmed per PLAN.md | | Gemini | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Gemini provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | | Codex | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Codex provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | CONCLUSION: Task 2 should inject --model <standard> via existing model param in buildPromptCommand for all providers.

tasks.title: Resolve standard tier model when model param is omitted
tasks.notes: Added resolvedModel = input.model ?? provider.modelTiers().standard in executePrompt(). Used resolvedModel in main command and both retry commands.
